text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my day off, I notice Narita Taishin near the
station. She must've just finished something,
because she's heading back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hang on, isn't there supposed to be a limited-edition Animal Hunt character that spawns around here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I might as well catch it while I have the chance.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't see it on the radar—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Bwah?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What the—?! "Wet concrete. Please watch your
step"?!

text_block_list.name: Construction Worker
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, miss. I think your boot's done for. Such a
shame.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Oops.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Great, now I only have one boot. How am I
supposed to get home barefoot?)
choice_data_list: Taishin? Is that you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh.

text_block_list.name: Construction Worker
text_block_list.text:
Oh, do you know this little lady? She stuck her
foot straight into the wet concrete.

text_block_list.name: Construction Worker
text_block_list.text:
Good thing your friend's here now, miss! Take
care getting home!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is bright red with embarrassment as
the construction worker waves goodbye and
leaves.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I need help or anything. Leave me
alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite what she says, it's clear that she'll have
trouble getting back to her dorm on her own.
choice_data_list: Hang on, I'll buy you some shoes.
Hang on, I'll buy you some shoes.

Let me get you to a shoe shop. You can lean on
my shoulder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite what she says, it's clear that she'll have
trouble getting back to her dorm on her own.
choice_data_list: Hang on, I'll buy you some shoes.
Hang on, I'll buy you some shoes.

Let me get you to a shoe shop. You can lean on
my shoulder.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You got wax in your ears? I said I don't need your
help.
choice_data_list: Should I give your dorm a call instead, then?
Should I give your dorm a call instead, then?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: N-no! That'll just make things worse!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh. Fine. Here, take this money and get me new shoes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since I got her permission, I bring her to a nearby
park to wait for me, then rush to a shoe shop.

text_block_list.name: Shoe Store Employee
text_block_list.text:
Young people these days love this style! They're
also great to run in, so I highly recommend them!

text_block_list.name: Shoe Store Employee
text_block_list.text:
And since you mentioned it earlier, these shoes
go great with street fashion too!
choice_data_list: I see...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I figure I can't go wrong with shoes that have the
employee's seal of approval, so I buy the pair she
recommends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, I run back to Narita Taishin and show
her the new shoes.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, thanks. You're a lifesav—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What the hell's with this cutesy nonsense?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
These aren't my style at all! You should know
better!
choice_data_list:
But the clerk said they go well with street
fashion.

But the clerk said they go well with street
fashion.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Now you're just admitting you got conned by a
sales pitch. Ugh, whatever. I guess I'll put them
on.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Huh... These actually don't feel so bad once you
put them on.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Urgh.
choice_data_list: They look great on you, Taishin!
They look great on you, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I-I don't need your flattery. As long as they don't
look weird, they're fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin seems indifferent about her new
shoes, but...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Taishin? Heading out somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you really like those new shoes of
yours! ♪ They look amazing with your outfit
today!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Y-you think?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, yeah... I guess they do.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely not! I'd rather hop there on my own
than lean on you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hup... Gah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin attempts to hop her way over but
loses balance after a few bounds.
choice_data_list:
You're going to hurt yourself! Come on, hold
onto me!

You're going to hurt yourself! Come on, hold
onto me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh, fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She reluctantly grabs hold of my shoulder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After walking for a while together, we come
across a park and decide to rest on a bench.
choice_data_list: So, what were you doing around there?
So, what were you doing around there?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...Playing a game. One of those location-based
ones.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The game involves finding and capturing
characters that are projected into the real world
via augmented reality.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She had been trying to catch a limited-edition
character when I saw her in front of the station.
choice_data_list:
Maybe we'll find the character while we're
walking.

Maybe we'll find the character while we're
walking.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: As if it'd be that—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No way! There's a blip on the radar!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, the character she's after has actually
appeared. She tells me its coordinates, which
aren't too far from where we are now.
choice_data_list: It's close by. Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list:
You gotta let off some steam after that whole
shoe fiasco!

You gotta let off some steam after that whole
shoe fiasco!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That's not a bad way to look at it. It'd suck to go
back with a bad taste in my mouth because of
that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All right. I'm definitely gonna catch it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin nods, and I lend her my shoulder
again. We head off to where the character has
appeared.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our teamwork pays off, and Narita Taishin
manages to capture the limited-edition character.
choice_data_list: Congrats, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, thanks. I guess I do feel a little better.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having finally arrived at a shop, Narita Taishin
buys new shoes. She seems to be in a better mood
when we part.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I've grown a little closer to Narita
Taishin after working together with her.
